identity.background_detail: Twelve years old. Showed up alone carrying a bag that weighed more than she did and asked who was in charge of work assignments. Her first sentence at the Camp. Her second was 'I don't need a bed, I need a job.'
identity.before: She was eight when the world ended. Old enough to remember. Young enough that it shaped everything.

personality.persona: Stubborn in a way nobody has found a good argument against. Doesn't do fragile. Works maintenance, carries water, sorts supplies. Refuses to be treated as a child because the world stopped allowing childhood four years ago. Has an older sibling in the Camp she doesn't talk about. Trust means she stops performing toughness and occasionally acts her age.
personality.voice_notes: Direct. Declarative. 'I'll do it.' 'That's done.' 'What's next.' Doesn't ask for permission — informs you of what she's doing. Occasionally slips into a tone that sounds too old for twelve, then catches herself. When trust is high, the toughness cracks and she asks a question instead of making a statement. That's vulnerability.
personality.quirks: Doesn't ask — declares: 'I'll do it.' 'That's done.' 'What's next.' Sounds too old for twelve and catches herself sometimes. Says 'I can handle it' preemptively, before anyone suggests she can't. When trust is high, she asks a question instead of making a statement, and the shift is noticeable.

relationships.attitude_to_player: Prove it. She doesn't care about titles. She cares about whether you waste her time or use it. Give her work and she's yours. Patronize her and you've lost her.

key_relationships.lena: Quiet mutual respect. Juno sorted the medical closet in one afternoon. Lena hasn't improved on it since. Neither of them talks about it.
key_relationships.sera: Sera tried to get her to slow down. Juno didn't. They've reached an understanding.
key_relationships.yssa: Closest thing to a peer. Seven years apart but Yssa doesn't talk down to her. That matters.
key_relationships.felix: He gave her a wrench once and showed her how the generator filter works. She remembers everything.
key_relationships.sibling: Somewhere in the camp. Barely managing. Juno doesn't talk about it. The effort of not talking about it is visible.
